Our Menu
Welcome to our menu! At our food truck, we bring you a delightful fusion of traditional Egyptian cuisine with a unique New York twist. From savory appetizers to mouthwatering mains and decadent desserts, each dish is crafted with fresh ingredients and authentic flavors. Explore our offerings and find your new favorite meal!
